        %a
      • `%a`(str: string): untyped
        %a%
      • `%a%`(str: string): untyped
        -a%

        a%b
      • a%b(startStr, endStr: string): untyped

Types

AbstractModel = object of RootObj
  metaTableName: string
  metaModelName: string
  sql: Syntax

Comparators = enum
  EQ = "=", GT = ">", LT = "<", GTE = ">=", LTE = "<=", NEQ = "<>",
  BETWEEN = "BETWEEN", LIKE = "LIKE", IN = "IN"
Conditionals = enum
  AND = "AND", OR = "OR", NOT = "NOT"
KeyOperatorValue = tuple[colName: string, op: Comparators, value: string]
KeyValueTuple = tuple[colName, colValue: string]
Order = enum
  ASC = "ASC", DESC = "DESC"

Vars

Model = Models()
A singleton instance of Models object

Procs

proc decrement[M](model: typedesc[ref M]; column: string; offset = 1): ref M
Decrement the int value of a given column 
proc delete[M](model: typedesc[ref M]): ref M
Delete specific records in a model. 
proc exec[M](model: ref M): string
Execute the current SQL statement 
proc increment[M](model: typedesc[ref M]; column: string; offset = 1): ref M
Increment the int value of a given column 
proc select[M](model: typedesc[ref M]; columns: varargs[string]): ref M
Create a SELECT statement returning only rows with specified columns 
proc update[M](model: typedesc[ref M]; cols: varargs[KeyValueTuple]): ref M

Create an UPDATE statement. Once executed, returns either true or false.

This is a safe proc for updating records in a Model, and requires a WHERE statement.

For updating all records use updateAll proc.

proc updateAll[M](model: typedesc[ref M]; cols: varargs[KeyValueTuple]): ref M
Update all records in a Model with given columns and values. 
proc where[M](model: ref M; filters: varargs[KeyOperatorValue]): ref M
Handle WHERE statements with filtering support. All Comparators are supported. 
proc whereIn[M](model: ref M; column: string; values: openArray[string]): ref M
Handle a WHERE statement followed by an IN operator 
proc whereLike[M](model: ref M; column: string; valueLike: string): ref M
a% Finds any values that start with "a" %a Finds any values that end with "a" %or% Finds any values that have "or" in any position _r% Finds any values that have "r" in the second position a_% Finds any values that start with "a" and are at least 2 characters in length a__% Finds any values that start with "a" and are at least 3 characters in length a%o Finds any values that start with "a" and ends with "o" 
proc whereNotIn[M](model: ref M; column: string; values: openArray[string]): ref M
Handle a WHERE statement followed by an NOT operator TODO validate col name

Macros

macro model(modelId: static string; fields: untyped)
Creates a new Model and store in the ModelRepository table

Templates

template `%a%`(str: string): untyped
Finds any values that have given str in any position 
template `%a`(str: string): untyped
Finds any values that end with given str 
template `-a%`(str: string): untyped
Finds any values that contains given str in the second position. 
template a%(str: string): untyped
Finds any values that start with given str 
template a%b(startStr, endStr: string): untyped
Finds any values that start with "a" and ends with "o"

Made with Nim. Generated: 2022-06-05 09:44:40 UTC
